response.justification: Strong software engineer with 15+ years at production scale and demonstrated technical leadership, but lacks the specific experimentation platform, metrics infrastructure, and growth systems expertise central to this Principal role. Would require significant domain ramp-up despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: 15+ years production engineering across web, mobile, embedded systems with demonstrated scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby, top-10 apps at WatchUp)
Staff-level technical leadership with teaching/mentoring track record (workshops, open source libraries like GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
Strong fundamentals in required languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, C++, C#, Java) with hands-on TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practices
concerns: No demonstrated experience building experimentation platforms, A/B testing systems, or feature-flagging frameworks—core to this role's responsibility
Missing required Python language proficiency and no explicit metrics/telemetry infrastructure background despite working at scale
Lacks evidence of data analysis, statistical methods, bias detection, or rollout-risk management required for growth measurement systems
